Add to cart
Free
shipping
over $30*
Free shipping on most orders over $30!
We ship to almost everywhere in Australia and use courier services to deliver to your door! Most orders over $30 ship for free, but there are sadly a few exceptions for more remote areas.
Calculate your shipping cost
Speedy delivery
It takes about 1-3 business days for a metro order and 2-5 business days for rural/regional addresses (up to 8 days for WA & NT).
Average delivery in 2-3 days
30 day money back
guarantee
Love it or your money back, no questions asked!
We’re absolutely sure that you’re going to love our products, but sometimes things just don’t work out the way you expect. If for whatever reason, you aren’t happy with your purchase, you can
contact us
within 30 days of receiving your product for a refund for orders purchased through our website. We'll arrange a refund that will be issued to your original payment method, and you can expect the funds to appear in your account within 5-10 business days.
If you paid for shipping on your order, please note that we can't refund the shipping cost, just the cost of the product itself.

Overview
Double length
Extra cushy 3-ply
100% bamboo
Plastic free
Bring the wonders of water to your bathroom with our newest and splashiest limited edition.
Details
Featuring mystical mermaids, bathing bigfoots, and even Nessie herself, The Splash Edition is filled to the brim with all kinds of splishy, sploshy fun. But the real splash? 50% of profits are donated to help more people enjoy clean water too.
Double length rolls, 370 sheets
10cm x 10cm sized sheets
Extra cushy 3-ply toilet paper
Renewable and sustainable bamboo
Plays well with most septic tanks
No inks or dyes
Kind to sensitive bums
17 belly flops (give or take)
Sustainability
Every day, over one million trees are cut down to make traditional toilet paper. We’re not so keen on killing trees just to make TP, which is why these rolls
